plugins.name: System Monitor
plugins.author: deck-os/official
plugins.description: Real-time CPU, memory, network, and process monitoring with configurable alert thresholds.
plugins.readme: Official Deck OS system monitor plugin. Provides CPU, memory, disk and network stats via the command bus.

plugins.name: AI Chat
plugins.author: deck-os/official
plugins.description: Core JARVIS conversational AI powered by the 3-tier model router (Ollama → Open WebUI → rule engine).
plugins.readme: Official Deck OS AI chat plugin. Routes prompts through Ollama, Open WebUI, and the rule engine.

plugins.name: Weather Monitor
plugins.author: community/weatherbot42
plugins.description: Fetches current weather and 7-day forecasts for your location. Emits alerts when severe weather is detected.
plugins.readme: Polls the Open-Meteo API (no key required) every 15 minutes and emits `weather.update` events to the EventBus. Configure your latitude/longitude in plugin settings.

plugins.name: Pomodoro Timer
plugins.author: community/focuslab
plugins.description: A productivity timer that integrates with the JARVIS voice system. Announces work/break intervals via TTS.
plugins.readme: Configurable Pomodoro timer (default: 25 min work, 5 min break). Uses JARVIS TTS to announce intervals. Commands: start, stop, status.

plugins.name: Home Assistant Bridge
plugins.author: community/smarthome_dev
plugins.description: Bidirectional bridge to Home Assistant. Control HA entities from Deck OS and receive state changes as device events.
plugins.readme: Connects to your Home Assistant instance via long-lived access tokens. Syncs entity state to Deck OS device registry and forwards commands back. Requires HA_URL and HA_TOKEN environment variables.

plugins.name: Daily Briefing
plugins.author: community/morning_owl
plugins.description: Generates a personalized morning briefing combining weather, calendar events, and news headlines, delivered via JARVIS TTS.
plugins.readme: Fires at a configurable time each morning. Aggregates weather from Open-Meteo, headlines from NewsAPI, and generates a summary using the local AI. Speaks the result via ElevenLabs TTS.
